title: Ponder for KubeJS
description: Create custom Ponder scenes with KubeJS.
body:
Create custom [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) Ponder scenes with [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs). Please read the [GitHub wiki](https://github.com/AlmostReliable/ponderjs/wiki) to find examples or join our [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/ThFnwZCyYY) for help.

This mod is a continuation of [PonderJS](https://github.com/Create-Additions/Ponderjs) for **1.18.2+**. For older versions, take a look at the [original project](https://github.com/Create-Additions/Ponderjs).

### Credits
- kotakotik22 for the original project
- the Create team for the Ponder system
